_description.fresh_cross_policy: BUY, PREPARE, Buy Queue, and alert candidates always require EMA9 above EMA20 with cross age 0-2 trading days. MAX_FRESH_CROSS_DAYS is defined in config.py.
_description.buy_min_priority_score: Minimum PriorityScore for actionable BUY queue candidates.
_description.buy_min_rr: Minimum risk/reward ratio for actionable BUY queue candidates.
_description.prepare_min_rr: Minimum risk/reward ratio for PREPARE candidates.
_description.watch_min_opportunity_score: Minimum OpportunityScore for WATCH queue candidates when no hard block exists.
_description.ai_confidence_warning_threshold: Below this value AI confidence is a warning, not a hard veto.
_description.extended_is_hard_block: When true, extended/chasing setups cannot enter actionable queues.
